title: Cobweb Outline
description: Highlights cobwebs with a clean outline to improve visibility and control during PvP fights.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/283ed92087a3439b2f10709b1a05fca2fc67579a.png)

#  Cobweb Outline

Cobweb Outline is a lightweight PvP utility resource pack designed to improve cobweb visibility while maintaining Minecraft’s vanilla aesthetic.

The pack adds a clean and easily noticeable outline to cobwebs, helping players identify traps faster, react more efficiently during combat, and maintain better awareness in competitive gameplay situations.

---

##  Overview

Built for PvP-focused gameplay, Cobweb Outline enhances visual clarity without heavily altering the original Minecraft style.
Its minimal and lightweight design makes it ideal for players who want improved visibility while keeping a clean vanilla-friendly experience.

![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f15787198e2449ff4338175cdc3f145b08570e24.png)

---

## ✨ Features

> • Clear and visible cobweb outlines
> • Improved trap visibility during combat
> • Better gameplay awareness in PvP situations
> • Vanilla-friendly visual style
> • Lightweight and simple implementation

---

## 🎮 Recommended For

> • PvP gameplay
> • Trap-based strategies
> • Bedwars & Survival combat
> • Competitive multiplayer servers

---

## 🧩 Resolution

> **16x Vanilla Resolution**
